meta.name: Cici Air / Motion
meta.description: A light editorial portfolio system that combines Apple-like spatial calm with outdoor movement signals expressed through restrained neon yellow-green accents.
source_references: Andrew B. Myers scattered still-life reference
Cici black-and-white standing portrait with single-edge outline
Cici personal outdoor portrait for mobile

primary.role: Primary text, solid calls to action, and high-contrast controls

secondary.role: Main page field and calm neutral canvas

accent.role: Subject outline, micro-stickers, highlighted word, route line, and interaction feedback

neutral.usage: White and cool gray surfaces carry most of the interface; charcoal is reserved for Field Notes; medium grays support metadata and secondary copy.

color.contrast_strategy: Dark-on-light dominant; neon yellow-green never carries small text on a light background and is paired with charcoal when used as a fill.

font_families.heading: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Display, Helvetica Neue, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif
font_families.body: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, PingFang SC, Arial, sans-serif
font_families.mono: Same system sans stack for quiet metadata rather than a technical mono voice

typography.font_style_notes: Neutral system grotesk with very light display weights, calm sentence case, generous leading, and tightly balanced large headings.

spacing.section_rhythm: Long 120–200px section openings alternate with calmer 72–132px content intervals; mobile compresses without becoming dense.

layout.grid_system: Fluid 12-column editorial grid with a single-column mobile collapse
layout.alignment_tendency: Asymmetric grid with deliberate stagger and large quiet fields

shape.border_usage: Subtle 1px neutral dividers and inset media frames
shape.divider_style: Hairline cool-gray rules; one route divider uses neon yellow-green

elevation.shadow_style: Nearly none, with one soft diffused mobile navigation shadow
elevation.depth_cues: Whitespace, overlapping type and image, subtle surface shifts, and restrained blur in navigation

iconography.style: Minimal directional arrows and geometric micro-marks
iconography.preferred_set: Native Unicode arrows plus custom CSS marks

motion.entrance_pattern: Desktop capabilities begin as four tightly clustered stickers on a blank field; card surfaces, sticker placement, heading, and copy reveal in separate wheel-scrubbed stages
motion.exit_pattern: No choreographed exits; navigation closes with a short fade and lift
motion.philosophy: Minimal functional motion with a different but related gesture in each section

components.button_style: Light pill outlines and one charcoal primary pill; neon appears on hover and focus
components.input_style: Large clickable media placeholders with 1px frames, quiet grid, and compact metadata pills
components.card_style: Capability surfaces are invisible until scroll reveals their hairline frames; products form a compact one-screen constellation; Experience uses a flat editorial two-column resume instead of floating cards
components.navigation_pattern: Fixed translucent desktop bar; compact frosted popover menu on smaller screens
components.list_style: Horizontal work index, bordered case studies, and a vertical 1px route timeline
components.component_notes: Each desktop section owns one neon behavior: Hero portrait outline and title mark, consistently colored person-sticker outlines, product plinth hover, resume rules, or contact emphasis.

aesthetic.visual_metaphor: A quiet editorial field crossed by training markers and route signals
aesthetic.era_influence: Contemporary Apple product editorial mixed with 2020s independent sports-culture graphics
aesthetic.genre: Minimal portfolio editorial with athletic micro-graphics

visual_language.visual_weight_distribution: Light neutral fields carry most screens; weight concentrates briefly in portrait, large headings, and one charcoal notes section
visual_language.focal_strategy: Progressive reveal with one neon protagonist per section
visual_language.contrast_level: High for type, low for surfaces, selective high-chroma accent
visual_language.texture_usage: Almost none; a barely visible page grain and analog portrait softness

composition.hierarchy_method: Scale contrast, spatial isolation, medium-weight typography, and selective accent color
composition.flow_direction: Top-to-bottom with subtle horizontal forward motion
composition.grouping_strategy: Large sectional whitespace, thin dividers, and aligned metadata clusters
composition.negative_space_role: Primary carrier of calm, premium tone, and reading rhythm

imagery.photo_treatment: Desktop Hero uses the original high-resolution black-and-white standing portrait as a restrained editorial panel beginning near the 49% page line, preserving its fluorescent offset outline and studio light; the left identity field and far-right whitespace remain quiet. Mobile retains the previous outdoor portrait.
imagery.illustration_style: No standalone illustration system; CSS route lines and stickers act as micro-illustrations
imagery.graphic_elements: Four large transparent person stickers with fluorescent outlines, selective colored words, 1px rules, tiny status marks, and CSS-built product plinths
imagery.image_shape: A crisp 3:4 editorial Hero panel, transparent capability silhouettes, and nine single-front transparent product cutouts scaled by pack volume

interaction_feel.hover_behavior: Settled capability cards receive a fluorescent fill; full-color products ease to 110% scale with a lime shadow while their acrylic plinth catches lime; resume links use restrained lime rules
interaction_feel.loading_style: Static first paint; no blocking loader

brand_voice_in_ui.empty_state_approach: Calm editorial placeholders that state recommended content and ratio

overview.fallback_strategy: Disable motion through prefers-reduced-motion and retain the complete static composition

background_effects.description: A nearly invisible fixed monochrome grain prevents the large neutral fields from feeling sterile.
background_effects.technology: Inline SVG feTurbulence in CSS background-image

particle_systems.description: No particles; motion remains editorial and purposeful.

3d_elements.description: Single-front transparent product cutouts sit on three-face translucent acrylic blocks; hover triggers a short elastic lift and a restrained fluorescent-green refraction.
3d_elements.technology: CSS transforms, clip-path, pseudo-elements, and flat shadows

params.materials: frosted neutral acrylic with chartreuse refraction on hover

scroll_triggered_animations.trigger_points: Capabilities use staged ranges across 310vh: cards 10–38%, stickers 18–74%, heading 36–56%, copy 64–88%
scroll_triggered_animations.animation_type: reverse-FLIP sticker dispersion plus independent card clip, heading fade, and copy reveal
scroll_triggered_animations.scrub_behavior: continuous wheel-driven scrub; all other desktop effects remain hover-based

text_effects.description: One word turns neon on a charcoal field; another receives a thin neon inset underline on white.

image_effects.type: editorial portrait panel, transparent cutouts, and product still life
image_effects.description: Desktop uses the untouched high-resolution black-and-white Hero photograph, transparent capability stickers, and real product/packaging work arranged as an editorial still life.
image_effects.technology: Prepared raster/SVG assets plus CSS object-fit, filters, drop shadows, and transforms

params.filter_pipeline: products remain in their source color; Hero and capability portraits remain black-and-white with fluorescent outline
params.hover_transform: 680ms elastic product lift peaking at -36px and settling at -14px
params.reveal_animation: scroll-scrubbed capability card, sticker, heading, and copy placement

svg_animations.description: The retained mobile experience keeps its route draw; the new desktop Hero remains still and photographic.

visual_effects.composite_notes: The visual system intentionally avoids WebGL, particles, custom cursors, continuous marquees, and heavy blur. Neon is mostly a verb—outlining, labeling, marking, or underlining—with two controlled fill moments on capability cards and product plinth hover.
